message:
Implement P3.4: Search UI Component

- Add search.js module for search interface
- Query input with debounce for performance
- Agent and time filter dropdowns
- FTS5 query formatting with special character escaping
- Result cards with title, snippet, agent, workspace, time
- Recent conversations shown when query is empty
- Keyboard navigation support (Enter, Tab)
- Relative time formatting (Just now, 2h ago, etc.)
- No results state with helpful hint
- Loading indicator during search

Part of Phase 3: Web Viewer (coding_agent_session_search-uok7)

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
